game.solitaire.cell_empty: No movable cards in available cells.
game.solitaire.controls.freecell: [←]/[→] Move Column Cursor [Space] Select Source Column [Enter] Move [Z] Cancel Selection [X] Move to Free Cell [C] Move from Free Cell [P] Switch Mode [A] Undo [S] Save [R] Restart [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.solitaire.controls.klondike: [←]/[→] Move Column Cursor [Space] Select Source Column [Z] Cancel Selection [Enter] Move/Discard [X] Draw Card [C] Move from Waste to Column [P] Switch Mode [A] Undo [S] Save [R] Restart [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.solitaire.controls.spider: [←]/[→] Move Column Cursor [Space] Select Source Column [Enter] Move [Z] Cancel Selection [X] Deal Row [P] Switch Mode [A] Undo [S] Save [R] Restart [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.solitaire.description: Play FreeCell, Klondike, and Spider Solitaire in one game.
game.solitaire.details:
f%Clear all cards from the tableau according to the rules.

{tc:yellow}Game Rules:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}FreeCell:{tc:clear} Stack cards in alternating colors, descending order. Use the top-left cells for temporary storage. Finally, move cards to the foundations in ascending order (Ace to King) by suit.
{tc:light_cyan}Klondike:{tc:clear} Stack cards in alternating colors, descending order. Draw from the stock. Finally, move cards to the foundations in ascending order (Ace to King) by suit.
{tc:light_cyan}Spider:{tc:clear} Stack cards of the same suit in descending order. Remove complete sequences from King to Ace. You can deal additional rows to help.
 - {tc:#ff7f27}Difficulty 1:{tc:clear} Only black cards
 - {tc:#ff7f27}Difficulty 2:{tc:clear} Red and black cards
 - {tc:#ff7f27}Difficulty 3:{tc:clear} Cards separated by suit

{tc:yellow}Press P to change mode:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Mode:{tc:clear}
 - {tc:#ff7f27}F{tc:clear} FreeCell
 - {tc:#ff7f27}K{tc:clear} Klondike
 - {tc:#ff7f27}S{tc:clear} Spider
   - {tc:light_cyan}Difficulty:{tc:clear} 1-3 difficulty

{tc:yellow}Items:{tc:clear}
{tc:red}[A]-[K]{tc:clear} Hearts (Red)
{tc:rgb(255,165,0)}[A]-[K]{tc:clear} Diamonds (Red)
{tc:white}[A]-[K]{tc:clear} Spades (Black)
{tc:cyan}[A]-[K]{tc:clear} Clubs (Black)

{tc:red}Some deals may be unsolvable!{tc:clear}

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:#ff7f27}FreeCell:{tc:clear}
   {tc:light_cyan}[←]/[→]{tc:clear} Move column cursor
   {tc:light_cyan}[Space]{tc:clear} Select source column
   {tc:light_cyan}[Enter]{tc:clear} Move
   {tc:light_cyan}[Z]{tc:clear} Cancel selection
   {tc:light_cyan}[X]{tc:clear} Move to free cell
   {tc:light_cyan}[C]{tc:clear} Move from free cell
   {tc:light_cyan}[P]{tc:clear} Switch mode
   {tc:light_cyan}[A]{tc:clear} Undo
   {tc:light_cyan}[S]{tc:clear} Save
   {tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
   {tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
{tc:#ff7f27}Klondike:{tc:clear}
   {tc:light_cyan}[←]/[→]{tc:clear} Move column cursor
   {tc:light_cyan}[Space]{tc:clear} Select source column
   {tc:light_cyan}[Z]{tc:clear} Cancel selection
   {tc:light_cyan}[Enter]{tc:clear} Move/Discard
   {tc:light_cyan}[X]{tc:clear} Draw card
   {tc:light_cyan}[C]{tc:clear} Move from waste to column
   {tc:light_cyan}[P]{tc:clear} Switch mode
   {tc:light_cyan}[A]{tc:clear} Undo
   {tc:light_cyan}[S]{tc:clear} Save
   {tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
   {tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
{tc:#ff7f27}Spider:{tc:clear}
   {tc:light_cyan}[←]/[→]{tc:clear} Move column cursor
   {tc:light_cyan}[Space]{tc:clear} Select source column
   {tc:light_cyan}[Enter]{tc:clear} Move
   {tc:light_cyan}[Z]{tc:clear} Cancel selection
   {tc:light_cyan}[X]{tc:clear} Deal row
   {tc:light_cyan}[P]{tc:clear} Switch mode
   {tc:light_cyan}[A]{tc:clear} Undo
   {tc:light_cyan}[S]{tc:clear} Save
   {tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
   {tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.solitaire.name: Solitaire
game.solitaire.spider_need_full: Cannot deal when there is an empty column.
game.solitaire.waste_invalid: Cannot place waste card onto this column.
